case_title: LUDMILA KRYAN VS.THOMAS A STAHL et al

STAHL AND BO JULIE KIM AND AGAINST LUDMILA KRYAN IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 PRINCIPAL AND $30.00 COSTS FOR A TOTAL OF $530.00. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Michael J Raifsnider, clerk-Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal, Appellant, Ludmila Kryan, appears in Pro Per. Respondent, Thomas A. Stahl appears with Attorney, Paul Ota. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Raifsnider.

9:29am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Judgment Entered
